Mira Stanic
Senior Software Engineer - Novi Sad, Serbia
mira.stanic@example.com

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer, Helioscope Analytics (2021 - present)
- Led the migration of the ingestion pipeline from nightly batches to streaming
  (Kafka, Python), cutting data latency from 4 hours to 90 seconds.
- Reduced p95 API latency by 38% by introducing a Redis read-through cache in
  front of PostgreSQL.
- Mentored a team of 6 engineers through the company's first SOC 2 audit.

Software Engineer, Dunav Logistics (2017 - 2021)
- Built the berth-scheduling service in Go, saving an estimated 40000 EUR per
  year in demurrage fees.
- Carried the on-call pager for the tracking platform, driving incident count
  down from 12 to 3 per quarter.

PROJECTS

openroster - open-source shift-planning library in Python with 2300 GitHub
stars; maintainer since 2019.

ferryline - hobby real-time ferry tracker for the Danube, built with Go and
WebSockets.

SKILLS

Python, Go, Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform
